title: Packet 035 Through Packet 038 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Reconciliation Gate
objective: Publish the local Packet 035 through Packet 038 Olares-first AI workflow authority and operator surfaces through the parent-root boundary, then restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity non-destructively without widening into source-feature work, migration, runtime mutation, AI-services expansion, or hosting transition.
dependency_note: Packet 038 completed the host-side proof and left `/home/olares/code/apex` dirty only in the bounded first-slice staging surface: `tools/shell/common.sh` plus untracked `tools/ai/*`. Packet 039 is the next truthful follow-on because that host dirtiness should be reconciled only by publishing the matching local authority and operator surfaces, not by destructive cleanup.
excluded_drift: any unrelated authority drift outside the Packet 035 through Packet 038 first-slice surfaces
validation_steps: Confirm parent-root and `origin/clean-main` start aligned before publication.
Confirm `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, and dirty set before reconciliation.
Confirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only the Packet 035 through Packet 038 first-slice authority and operator surfaces plus this Packet 039 draft authority, routing, and roadmap files.
Run JSON parse checks on new packet files and `git diff --cached --check` before committing.
Confirm no product source, package, or lockfile paths are staged.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication without remote rewrite.
Reconcile `/home/olares/code/apex` non-destructively by proving blob equality for the dirty staged host files, then fast-forward-only synchronize to the published commit.
preserved_boundaries: Authority publication is not product source-feature execution.
No migration approval opens in Packet 039.
No runtime or service mutation opens in Packet 039.
No installs, package-manager activation/download, package mutation, or lockfile mutation open in Packet 039.
No AI-services expansion opens in Packet 039.

next_action: Stage only the bounded publication scope, publish it through `origin/clean-main`, and restore `/home/olares/code/apex` to clean parity non-destructively.
